name: SomeIpRemoveProvidedEventGroup
title: SomeIpRemoveProvidedEventGroup
description: Removes an Event Group from a Provided Service Instance. The Event Group was previously added by SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup.
The Events and Fields assigned to the Event Group are not deleted when the Event Group is closed.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group (see SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
